projects.title: AI MCQ & Test Platform
projects.description: A full-stack AI-powered testing and survey platform where users can host and attempt tests. Supports AI-based question generation using Groq API as well as manual test creation. Includes surveys, role-based access control, payments, authentication, and CI/CD.
features: AI-based MCQ generation
Manual test & survey creation
Role-based access (Admin / Teacher / User)
Test attempts with scoring & analytics
Survey creation & responses
Google OAuth authentication
Razorpay payment integration
CI/CD pipeline

projects.title: Secure Link Wrapper System
projects.description: A link protection system designed to prevent automated abuse and bot access. Uses multi-layer challenge verification, CAPTCHA protection, and Cloudflare-based defenses to secure sensitive links.
features: Protected link redirection
Challenge-based verification system
Multiple CAPTCHA layers
Bot & automation prevention
Image & object-based challenges

projects.title: AES-128 LMS – Secure Scalable Learning Platform
projects.description: A full-stack LMS with TypeScript, React (Next.js) and Node.js microservices, backed by PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM, supporting secure multi-quality HLS streaming (480p–1080p).
features: Full-stack LMS with microservices architecture
PostgreSQL + Prisma ORM integration
Multi-quality HLS streaming (480p–1080p)
Serverless pipeline (AWS Lambda + FFmpeg) for transcoding
AES-128 encryption for video content
Secure delivery with CloudFront signed URLs & private S3
Custom HLS player with Web Worker-based decryption
projects.credit: Made by [Amber Bisht](https://amberbisht.me). He is a DevOps & Full Stack Developer.

projects.title: Kundali Compatibility Engine
projects.description: A Vedic astrology marriage compatibility engine that generates astronomically accurate birth charts and AI-ready structured data for two individuals. Built with Swiss Ephemeris for precision and designed so AI (ChatGPT, etc.) can provide deep astrological analysis from the output.
features: Lahiri Ayanamsa + Whole Sign house system using Swiss Ephemeris for sub-arcsecond astronomical precision
Ashtakoota Guna Milan (scored out of 36) with Manglik, Nadi, and Bhakoot dosha detection & cancellation logic
Divisional chart (Navamsa D9) computation, planetary aspects (Drishti), transit snapshots, and Vimshottari Dasha timeline
Dynamic AI Prompt Generator producing 6 customized prompts (Marriage, Career, Health, etc.) for ChatGPT based on raw chart data
Secure authentication via Google OAuth, geocoding place autocomplete, and MongoDB profile persistence
Supports pre-1960 historical timezone adjustments (Bombay, Calcutta, and WWII War Time offsets)

projects.title: DSA Practice Platform
projects.description: A professional, high-performance coding practice platform mirroring LeetCode. Provides a split-screen Monaco editor interface, secure Docker-isolated C++ compilation, and BullMQ/Redis async execution.
features: LeetCode-style 3-pane split-screen IDE featuring high-performance Monaco Code Editor
Structured parameter UI mapping inputs directly to core solution class logic
Docker-isolated runner compiling and executing user code in secure, resource-capped containers
Real-time feedback with precise runtime speed and memory usage metrics
Asynchronous submission execution engine powered by BullMQ and Redis
Full admin suite for problem management, test case uploads, and submission tracking

projects.title: Telegram Owner-Reply Bot
projects.description: An AI-powered Telegram chatbot that replies on behalf of the owner in authorized groups. Features per-user memory persistence, real-time context enrichment, and Rose-bot-like administrative/moderation commands.
features: AI-powered owner-persona replies in groups using Groq SDK with automatic API key failover
Stores persistent per-user memory signals in MongoDB with a fast in-memory LRU cache index
Group context awareness remembering the last 15-20 messages to follow conversational flow
Real-time context enrichment (Open-Meteo weather, NewsAPI headlines, Wikipedia, and Tavily search)
Group moderation and administration commands (/mute, /unmute, /ban, /unban, /fban, /funban)
Automated CI/CD deployment workflow using Docker, docker-compose, and GitHub Actions

experience.title: Full Stack Developer
experience.description: Delivered 6+ production-grade web platforms across hospitality, EdTech, and SaaS domains using Next.js and Node.js, supporting hundreds of daily active users. Designed modular backend services with Express.js, MongoDB, and PostgreSQL, improving API response times by 25–40% and reducing feature delivery time by 30%. Containerized applications deployed and operated using Docker, CI/CD pipelines, cron jobs, and third-party integrations (Razorpay, OAuth), achieving 99%+ deployment reliability.

experience.title: Software Intern
experience.description: Contributed to the design and development of a custom internal CRM system using ReactJS for the frontend and NodeJS for the backend, focusing on modular architecture and maintainable code practices. Implemented reusable UI components, integrated RESTful APIs, and collaborated closely with backend services to ensure smooth data flow and performance optimization. Containerized the entire application using Docker, creating consistent and reproducible development, testing, and production environments, which simplified deployments, reduced environment-specific issues, and improved overall release reliability.

freelance.title: JB Kadaknath Farm
freelance.description: A complete hyperlocal dark store platform (similar to Blinkit) for delivering fresh meat, eggs, and organic foods with a 15-minute delivery promise. Includes 3 separate interfaces: User App, Admin Dashboard, and Rider App. Geolocation-based routing, Google Maps API integration, and microservices architecture.
features: Hyperlocal delivery routing and maps integration for 15-minute quick delivery of meat and eggs
Consists of 3 distinct applications: User Ordering App, Rider Delivery App, and Admin Dashboard
Google Maps API integration for real-time address validation, geocoding, and distance calculations
Secure online payment flow supporting credit cards, UPI, and refunds integrated with Razorpay
Cloudflare R2 storage bucket integration for lightning-fast media and product image serving
Microservices backend backed by PostgreSQL & Prisma ORM, protected by Cloudflare Turnstile CAPTCHA

freelance.title: Quick to Services
freelance.description: A booking platform to hire reliable professionals for home and office services (similar to Urban Company). Features an integrated admin panel, city-based dynamic pricing, and secure inquiry forms.
features: Book reliable professionals for home and office service needs
Robust administrative dashboard for managing services, professionals, and bookings
Cloudflare Turnstile integration for secure, bot-protected inquiry forms
MongoDB database backend for storing profiles and service transactions
City-based dynamic pricing and service category configuration

freelance.title: SBDS Service – Digital Cyber Cafe Platform
freelance.description: A complete end-to-end digital services and cyber cafe platform. Features role-based access control, Paytm payment gateway integration, custom service configurations, WhatsApp notifications, and third-party API integration for direct service bookings.
features: Role-based system allowing agents and users to request and fulfill various online services
Integrated Paytm payment gateway for secure transactions and automated bookings
WhatsApp API integration for sending instant order status updates and alerts
Direct booking of external services connected via third-party APIs
Admin control panel to configure custom service offerings and markups dynamically
Prisma ORM with PostgreSQL database, and ImageKit for optimized media storage

freelance.title: jbDrench
freelance.description: A high-performance e-commerce showcase platform for premium bottles. Uses Cloudflare geolocation routing to serve region-specific product links and Amazon affiliate redirects (Amazon India vs Amazon Global).
features: Showcases full range of premium bottles with geolocation-based filtering
Utilizes Cloudflare edge request headers to detect regional user location
Dynamic routing redirects Indian visitors to Amazon India and international users to Amazon Global
Asynchronous email marketing and newsletter subscription system backed by Redis and BullMQ
Full-featured admin control panel for product links, subscribers, and background queues

freelance.title: NotesFind – End-to-End Notes Management Platform
freelance.description: A complete end-to-end platform for notes management featuring role-based access control, a banning system, audit logging to track downloads, webinars, and Markdown-to-PDF conversion.
features: Role-based access control (User, Owner, Publisher, Co-owner)
Banning system and administrative controls
Audit logs to track and monitor note downloads
Webinars integration for user engagement
Markdown-to-PDF (.md to PDF) dynamic conversion
Publishers can upload notes in .md format for normal online reading and downloading

freelance.title: TripBazaar – Premium Hotel Booking Platform
freelance.description: A modern, high-performance hotel booking platform designed for B2C and B2B users. Features multi-channel sourcing (RTX & OYO), ultra-fast search powered by Typesense, and integrated payments.
features: Multi-channel sourcing integrated with RTX (Rakuten Travel Xchange), OYO, and custom B2B inventory
Ultra-fast, advanced hotel search and filtering engine powered by Typesense
Secure payments and refunds full integration with Razorpay
Dedicated B2B Owner Portal for hotel owners to list properties and manage bookings
Automated email confirmations via SendGrid/Nodemailer and PDF receipt generation
Containerized Docker architecture with Sentry monitoring and Cloudflare Turnstile security
